AU_EDIDataDictionary.au_xsd: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <!-- W3C Schema generated by Adeptia Editor --> <xs:schema xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="Root"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><XsdType>EDIDataDictionary</XsdType> <XSDVersion>1</XSDVersion> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation><xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="Record" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xs:complexType><xs:sequence> <xs:element name="ACK.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>General acknowledgment message</description> <version>ACK</version> <functionID></functionID> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element><xs:element name="ADR.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>ADT response</description> <version>ADR</version> <functionID></functionID> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element><xs:element name="ADT_A01.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Admit a patient</description> <version>ADT_A01</version> <functionID></functionID> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element><xs:element name="ADT_A02.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Transfer a patient</description> type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Register a patient</description> <version>ADT_A04</version> <functionID></functionID> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element><xs:element name="ADT_A05.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Preadmit a patient</description> <version>ADT_A05</version> <functionID></functionID> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element><xs:element name="ADT_A06.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Transfer an outpatient to <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Transfer an inpatient to outpatient</description> <version>ADT_A07</version> <functionID></functionID> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element><xs:element name="ADT_A08.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Update patient information</description> <version>ADT_A08</version> <functionID></functionID> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element><xs:element name="ADT_A09.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Patient departing</description> <description>Patient arriving</description> <version>ADT_A10</version> <functionID></functionID> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element><xs:element name="ADT_A11.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name="ADT_A12.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Cancel transfer</description> <version>ADT_A12</version> <functionID></functionID> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element><xs:element name="ADT_A13.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Cancel discharge</description> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element><xs:element name="ADT_A20.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Nursing/Census application name="ADT_A22.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Leave of absence - in (returning)</description> <version>ADT_A22</version> <functionID></functionID> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element><xs:element name="ADT_A23.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Delete a maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Merge patient information - patient ID only</description> <version>ADT_A34</version> <functionID></functionID> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element><xs:element name="ADT_A35.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Merge patient information - account <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Merge patient information - patient ID and account number</description> <version>ADT_A36</version> <functionID></functionID> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element><xs:element name="ADT_A37.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Unlink patient information</description> maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Purge patient account</description> <version>BAR_P02</version> <functionID></functionID> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element><xs:element name="DFT_P03.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Post detail financial </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element><xs:element name="MCF.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Delayed acknowledgement</description> minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Master File Acknowledgement</description> <version>MFK</version> <functionID></functionID> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element><xs:element name="ORF.xsd" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo> <description>Observ. result/record response</description>
